mapper.select: SELECT AVG((timeliness + attitude + accuracy) / 3.0) FROM credibility_ratings WHERE courier_id = #{courierId} AND is_excluded = 0 AND created_at >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 30 DAY)
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO credibility_ratings (courier_id, job_id, rater_id, rater_type, timeliness, attitude, accuracy, comment, customer_name) VALUES (#{courierId}, #{jobId}, #{raterId}, #{raterType}, #{timeliness}, #{attitude}, #{accuracy}, #{comment}, #{customerName})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM credibility_ratings WHERE job_id = #{jobId} AND is_excluded = 0 ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM credibility_ratings WHERE courier_id = #{courierId}
